---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as documented
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Environment

- **Cursell version:** (run `cursell --version`)
- **Node.js version:** (run `node --version`)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **AI CLI:** (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini + version)

## What you did

Exact command(s) you ran:

```
cursell ...
```

## What you expected

...

## What happened

Paste the full output / error message:

```
```

## Additional context

Screenshots, relevant config snippets, anything else that helps.

<!-- If this is a security issue, please email security@cursell.ai instead of opening a public issue. -->
